title: Design VPC and Network Architecture
description: Define Terraform modules for VPC, Subnets (Public/Private), NAT Gateways, and Security Groups required for EKS.
acceptance_criteria: VPC created with non-overlapping CIDR; Subnets tags correctly for AWS Load Balancer Controller

title: Implement EKS Control Plane & Node Groups
description: Provision EKS Control Plane and Managed Node Groups using Terraform. Configure OIDC provider.
acceptance_criteria: Control plane active in Multi-AZ; OIDC provider URL output; Worker nodes registered

title: Provision User Pool & Groups
description: Create Cognito User Pool with Terraform. Define User Groups (SystemAdmin, FinanceManager, ClientContact, VendorContact).
acceptance_criteria: User Pool created; 4 User Groups created; Password policies configured

title: Provision RDS PostgreSQL with pgvector
description: Deploy RDS instance using Terraform. Enable 'pgvector' extension via initialization script or parameter group.
acceptance_criteria: RDS instance active; pgvector extension installed; Security group allows EKS access

title: Setup NestJS Auth Module & JWT Strategy
description: Implement the core Auth module, passport-jwt strategy configuration using Cognito public keys (JWKS).
acceptance_criteria: JWTs signed by Cognito are validated; Expired tokens rejected

title: Client Entity CRUD & Validation
description: Implement DTOs with class-validator, Service methods, and Controller endpoints for Client management.
acceptance_criteria: Create, Read, Update, Delete endpoints work; Validation prevents invalid data

title: S3 Upload Service & Presigned URLs
description: Implement service to generate presigned URLs for secure client-side upload or handle streaming upload to S3.
acceptance_criteria: Validates file type (PDF/Docx) and size; Securely stores file in S3

title: SQS Event Producer Implementation
description: Implement producer service to publish 'SOW_UPLOADED' events to SQS queue.
acceptance_criteria: Message published to correct queue; Message contains S3 key

title: Worker Service Skeleton & SQS Consumer
description: Setup separate Node/Python service, configure SQS consumer loop with long-polling and error handling.
acceptance_criteria: Service consumes messages; Acknowledges success; Sends to DLQ on failure

title: Document Text Extraction Logic
description: Implement logic to download file from S3 and extract raw text from PDF/Docx.
acceptance_criteria: Text extracted accurately; Encoding issues handled; Large files handled

title: LLM Integration for Data Extraction
description: Integrate OpenAI API. Design prompts to extract structured JSON (Skills, Scope, Timeline).
acceptance_criteria: Returns valid JSON schema; Identifies key fields correctly; Handles API rate limits

title: PII Sanitization Logic
description: Implement PII detection and redaction using AWS Comprehend or LLM logic.
acceptance_criteria: PII detected in sample text; PII replaced with placeholders

title: Implement Audit Service & OpenSearch Client
description: Create service to format and write log entries to OpenSearch index asynchronously.
acceptance_criteria: Log entry structure matches schema; Writes are asynchronous

title: Generate & Store Embeddings
description: Implement logic to call OpenAI Embeddings API for Vendor skills and Project Briefs. Store in pgvector column.
acceptance_criteria: Embeddings generated successfully; Stored in correct vector format

title: Implement Vector Similarity Search
description: Write efficient SQL query using cosine distance operator to find matching vendors. Implement API endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: Returns ranked list of vendors; Query executes in < 500ms

title: Payment Intent API Implementation
description: Create endpoint to generate Stripe Payment Intents based on Invoice data.
acceptance_criteria: Correct amount/currency passed; Client secret returned

title: Webhook Handler & Signature Verification
description: Implement endpoint to receive Stripe webhooks. Verify signatures to prevent spoofing.
acceptance_criteria: Signatures verified using raw body; Events parsed correctly

title: Ledger Update Idempotency Logic
description: Implement logic to update internal ledger based on webhook events. Ensure idempotency using event IDs.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate events ignored; Ledger updated atomically
